Petition For Waiver Of Appointment Of Probate Referee And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Winters in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it adhered to the rule of having a Probate Referee appraise the property. Mr. Winters stated that there was no need to ascertain value by a Referee as the property was being occupied by the Sole Heir. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
